mapper.select: SELECT tb_position_change.*, tb_user.employee_number, tb_user.nick_name, tb_department.dept_name FROM tb_position_change INNER JOIN tb_user ON tb_position_change.user_id = tb_user.id AND tb_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_department ON tb_user.department_id = tb_department.id AND tb_department.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_position_change.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_position_change.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
